name: Grilled Fish Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 fresh or frozen fish fillets (about 4 oz.)
1 teaspoon lemon-pepper seasoning or Jamaican Jerk seasoning or Cajun seasoning
4 slices Onion and Olive Focaccia (see recipe) or 4 purchased focaccia rolls, split and toasted
roasted sweet red pepper strips or fresh tomato slices, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish if frozen.
2. Brush fish fillets with lemon juice.
3. Rub desired seasoning evenly onto all sides of the fish.
4. Place seasoned fish fillets in a well-greased wire grill basket.
5. Grill over medium coals for 4 to 6 minutes per side (for each 1/2 inch thickness) or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
6. Meanwhile, stir together mayonnaise, mustard, and honey in a small mixing bowl.
7. To serve, spread the dressing mixture onto the cut side of focaccia slices or buns. Add fish, additional dressing mixture, roasted red pepper strips, and fresh tomato slices. Top with more bread.
8. Makes 4 servings.
